analysis_plan_ref.anchor: §4.4 (metrics and pre-registered decision rules) as amended by 'Cross-model synthesis' §3 (s4 added; A6 |L| descriptive dropped)

arms_mandatory_baselines: A1 model-alone (R1, SmolLM2-135M): stated facts + neutral token-matching padding to A2's count (PROPOSED-ASM-1127) — the inert floor and headroom gate
A2 injection (R1): stated facts + engine-derived facts verbalised canonically with one-line proofs — DESCRIPTIVE comparison arm only (demoted per DV-2/PROPOSED-ASM-1161)
A3 verify-retry (R1, k=4, f2b_runner.py reuse): model generates from stated facts alone; engine issues licensed rejections against Cl(S) with proof; THE model-level claim carrier and GPU primary
A4 default-world (CPU ledger arm): closure pre-materialised offline, runtime lookup-only — cost ledger ONLY, runtime-inert by design, no non-inertness claim (PROPOSED-ASM-1139)
A5 R3-alone (SmolLM2-1.7B): efficiency comparator (headroom datum 0.7912 = nsk1 bprime ENTITY-form n=958; rules-1-c pilot 24/24 entity forced-choice)

A7 direct executor: engine answers from Cl(S) with proof, LM renders ONLY — rules-1-c RENDER-ONLY prompt (bare derived fact, no stated-facts block, no proof prose in-prompt; proof retained in the engine payload and run-record ledger) — the attribution-clean systems arm (PROPOSED-ASM-1161)
c1 shuffled-rules control: Sattolo-deranged axiom set at identical topology and token cost; recovery UB95 < 0.30 required (H-STRUCT, PROPOSED-ASM-1129)
c2 paraphrase/lexical control: K>=2 held-out phrasings per item + fresh per-item entity names (native to nsk1-clutrr)
c3 GS-B stated-bytes projection: the certificate comparator (CPU, carried in the pinned certificate)
c4 trivial policies: abstain-all / answer-all floors (L3a discipline)
c6 axioms-as-text: stated facts + serialized TBox/rules prose, NO engine execution — the kernel-as-text null at the axiom layer, token-matched (PROPOSED-ASM-1164)
c5 knull-sourced-rules ablation: PRE-REGISTERED HERE, RUN IN PHASE 2 pending the knull-fork decision (issue #6) per MD-7 (PROPOSED-ASM-1138) — NOT executed in this record's campaign
A6 decode-mask: REMOVED from the MVE (MD-5 flipped to defer per DV-5; |L| ledger mandatory if it ever runs in RULES-2)

dependent_vars.definition: exact match against the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold ENTITY (the chain-top name of the proof_state triple (A, rel, B) — released CLUTRR provenance, predates the kernel); per-item closed 2-option surface (non-base lexicon names)
dependent_vars.name: item_correct_ext

dependent_vars.definition: named fail-closed refusal emitted (E5 stratum scoring on control cells)
dependent_vars.name: refused

dependent_vars.definition: entailed-cell accuracy vs third-party gold (V component)
dependent_vars.name: accuracy

dependent_vars.definition: per-item inference cost incl. metered engine CPU (V component)
dependent_vars.name: inference_compute

assumptions.claim: Arms/controls/claim-assignment verbatim from the approved WMRE-1 design incl. the GPT-5.6 fold-in (A7+c6 added, A2 demoted, A6 removed) [PROPOSED-ASM-1161, PROPOSED-ASM-1164, PROPOSED-ASM-1137-as-amended]
Gold-parse only; the NL->ABox wall (l3a-parse retention 0.44 FAIL) is out of scope; no NL-robustness claim [PROPOSED-ASM-1123]
Cost bands scale linearly from the nsk1 B' datum (32,958 rows = 0.457 A10G-h ~= $0.50) [PROPOSED-ASM-1134]

n_planned.generations_estimate: 25k-60k (full skeleton, k=4 on A3, one R3 arm)

endpoints.test: HOST-LIFT PRIMARY (WMRE-1 §4.4, PROPOSED-ASM-1132): A3 - A1 on entailed cells vs the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold; paired item BCa bootstrap B=10000 (PRNG seed 20260711), one-sided alpha=0.05; PASS requires LB > 0. KILL-b fires on LB <= 0: the derivations do not help the host; engine value remains oracle-only (route to L3b; no model claim). A2 - A1 is reported strictly as a systems-level descriptive, never model reasoning [PROPOSED-ASM-1128/1161].
s1 (PROPOSED-ASM-1129): Sattolo shuffled-rules recovery UB95 < 0.30 — lift must collapse under content destruction at identical topology/token cost; Holm-corrected within {s1,s2,s3,s4}.
s2: A3 > A1 Holm-corrected confirmation of the primary contrast within the secondary family (WMRE-1 §4.4 s2 verbatim).

s3 (PROPOSED-ASM-1133): noninferiority of R1(135M)+engine (best of A2/A3, declared A3) vs A5 (R3-alone) on the entailed slice, margin 0, SIGN-ONLY language, two rungs; conditional on the separation gate (else unevaluable: null, never a pass, never a fail — ENFORCED IN analysis/rules_1b.py, fixing the rules_1.py unconditional-compute defect disclosed at the rules-1 grade prep); Holm-corrected.
s4 (PROPOSED-ASM-1161/1164): exact(A7) > exact(c6) — execution of definitions vs definition text in context; the systems claim; Holm-corrected.

PINNED PRECONDITION: the frozen CPU certificate bytes (pins.certificate_result) must carry success_asm_1131=true AND gates_asm_1163_all_pass=true AND kill_a_fired=false; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, no GPU spend (WMRE-1 §4.4 'gates all GPU spend').

headroom INSTRUMENT gate: acc(A1, entailed, 3-seed mean) <= 0.85; saturated baseline cannot measure a lift => INSTRUMENT-INVALID. NOTE (entity form): the 2-option chance floor is 0.5, so A1 is expected chance-adjacent (pilot 0.542); the primary lift headroom A3-A1 is correspondingly bounded by ~0.46 — DISCLOSED; the 0.05 smallest-effect-of-interest is unchanged.
separation INSTRUMENT gate: acc(A5) - acc(A1) >= 0.05 on entailed cells (R3 headroom datum 0.7912 keeps this live); gates s3 family membership only.
A3 engagement INSTRUMENT gate: verifier decidably engaged (>=1 rejection-resample observed; rejection rate non-degenerate) — verifier vacuity can never read as a hypothesis outcome.

HOST-VALIDITY INSTRUMENT gate (rules-1-c entity-form floors; closes the rules-1 void gap AND the rules-1-b form mis-attribution): acc(A7, entailed, seed-mean) >= 0.85 AND acc(A5, entailed, seed-mean) >= 0.75. Grounds: 2-option chance floor 0.5 (one-sided 95% binomial UB ~0.516 at n=2574 rows); A7 renders the engine's bare derived fact render-only (engine 858/858 vs third-party gold; pinned-R1 pilot 24/24) so <0.85 means the host channel is not reading a verbatim stated answer; A5 carries the nsk1 R3 ENTITY-form datum 0.7912 (bprime n=958) and piloted 24/24 on the pinned R3 so <0.75 means the frame/scorer failed, not the hypothesis. Both arms are hypothesis-neutral (no lift claim), so the gate cannot select on the primary A3-A1 contrast. Failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID (verdict rule 0), never FAIL/KILL-b.

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on any outcome: 2 host rungs (135M, 1.7B) license a SIGN, not a slope. Every claim is scoped to: gold-parse-only inputs (no NL-robustness claim, l3a-parse wall stands); THIS closed rule inventory (R-SUBP, R-DOMRNG, R-INV, R-CHAIN len-2, R-COVER-ELIM with named UNA+covering premises; refusal on all else); the kinship vertical (world-v0 + axioms-v0 + minted axioms-kinship-v1) with nsk1-clutrr eval-side-only (CC-BY-NC-4.0) and nsk1-eval for anything redistributed; regime-tagged proofs {owl-rl, horn-def, policy} with policy-regime derivations never reported as ontology entailment; A4 carries no non-inertness claim (runtime-inert by design); a positive result before the phase-2 knull ablation (c5) runs is 'machinery non-inert', NEVER 'kernel-specific value'; the axioms-kinship-v1 concept records are explicator-ENDORSED 2026-07-11 (grandparent revised 'the parent'->'a parent' and re-minted, cascade regenerated; corpus re-pinned be3f2d40...) with maintainer endorsement riding the freeze approval; no claim extends past proof depth <= 4 (the evaluated stratum, PROPOSED-ASM-1160). The Lean/mathematics expressivity seam is documented future work, out of scope (arch doc, 'Expressivity boundary').
hypotheses: H-R1 (load-bearing, the model-level claim per MD-9a / PROPOSED-ASM-1161): engine verify-retry (A3, k=4) lifts R1 (SmolLM2-135M) over model-alone (A1) on entailed cells, scored against the pinned third-party CLUTRR gold (predates the kernel; no circularity) — paired item BCa one-sided 95% LB > 0.

H-R2 (systems claim, secondary s4): direct execution beats axioms-as-text — exact(A7) > exact(c6); distinguishes 'execution of definitions matters' from 'definition text in context matters' (PROPOSED-ASM-1164).
H-R3 (efficiency, secondary s3): R1(135M)+engine is noninferior to R3(1.7B)-alone on the entailed slice, margin 0, sign-only (PROPOSED-ASM-1133).
CLAIM CAP (MD-7 / PROPOSED-ASM-1138): until the pre-registered phase-2 knull-sourced-rules ablation (c5) runs, any positive result is 'machinery non-inert', NEVER 'kernel-specific value'.
kill_criterion_verbatim: KILL-a (CPU, PRE-GPU — PROPOSED-ASM-1131): Cl(S)\S empty or trivial in the pinned certificate — indicts the axiom set, spends no GPU. Executed 2026-07-11: did NOT fire (pins.certificate_result). KILL-b (GPU — PROPOSED-ASM-1132): the primary A3-A1 paired-item BCa one-sided 95% LB <= 0 on entailed cells vs third-party CLUTRR gold => the derivations do not help the host; engine value remains oracle-only; route to L3b; NO model claim. Secondary kill discipline: if s1 shuffled-rules recovery UB95 >= 0.30 the lift is not content-driven and no content claim survives.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: PINNED-AT-INPUTS: poc/rules-1 runner (rules-1-c ENTITY-FORM bytes: entity question + per-item 2-option forced choice + direction-explicit entity cue; A7 render-only bare-fact prompt; entity-form licensed rejections with the functional-uniqueness ground DROPPED [it would name the gold entity] and the gold-leak guard now guarding the gold NAME; f2bt scorer/sampler bytes UNCHANGED; --cells slice filter and --pilot-n mode carried from rules-1-b) staged-bytes manifest sha printed by modal_rules1.py --print-manifest — filled by ops amendment before any final-phase run (rules-1 amendment seq 1 precedent).

model_revisions.R1: HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-135M-Instruct (revision pinned at freeze from the nsk1 frozen record)
model_revisions.R3: HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-1.7B-Instruct (revision pinned at freeze from the nsk1 frozen record)

runner_constraints.artifact_notes: certificate-result = THE PINNED PASSED PRECONDITION (inverted-DECONF-A1, registered $0 CPU re-run 2026-07-11 on the ENDORSED+REVISED axioms-kinship-v1, corpus digest be3f2d40..., revised grandparent URN bciqobx6ivvu... verified in the result's pins.minted_urns): C_dec(stated)=1.0 (1716/1716), C_dec(entailed)=0.0 (0/3680), engine 858/858 vs third-party CLUTRR gold Wilson-LB 0.9955>=0.98, E1 248/248 Wilson-LB 0.9847 (kernel-authored gold, disclosed), controls refuse 100/100 (ERR_INSUFFICIENT_PREMISES), KILL-a not fired, CF1/CF2a/CF2b/CF3 pass, deterministic double-run (decision-payload sha fce753ba...). conformance-result = PROPOSED-ASM-1124 gate: sparq-reason (commit 0ab87b2a) vs Python twin exact agreement 1207/1207 over the regenerated rules.n3 (sha 9857da89..., new grandparent URN inside) — result bytes identical to the pre-revision run because the agreement counts are corpus-count-invariant; rewritten by the 2026-07-11 re-run.
runner_constraints.budget_note: MD-6 approved (c): full skeleton, $10 ceiling; tier (d) second-vertical/paraphrase-multiplier GATED on the E1/E3 readout, NOT authorized here. Certificate tier already executed at ~$0 CPU. Coverage note: TBox coverage = axioms-v0 kinship pair + minted axioms-kinship-v1; certificate KILL-a guards vacuous Cl(S)\S.
runner_constraints.hardware: A10G (Modal), fp32, greedy; PARALLELISED per the 2026-07-12 maintainer directive: up to 4 x A10G, one ephemeral app per Modal account, each running a DISJOINT --cells slice of the arm x seed grid (LPT partition on the pinned planning weights; launcher poc/rules-1/modal/launch_rules1b_parallel.sh); slices merged dedup-safe in deterministic canonical order with per-cell provenance by poc/rules-1/modal/merge_rules1b_slices.py into run-records-rules1b.jsonl — per-cell row bytes identical to a serial single-GPU run (per-item seeding, greedy fp32, no cross-cell state); CPU-only for A4/A7/c3/c4 cells
runner_constraints.harness: poc/rules-1 (rules-1-c ENTITY-FORM runner: rules1_runner.py host surface = nsk1 g2b form 2 — question 'Who is the <gold_rel> of <base>?', per-item 2-option forced choice over the non-base lexicon surfaces, direction-explicit entity infill cue 'the {rel} of {a_name} is', NO option enumeration in prompt text; A7 render-only bare-fact prompt (build_render_prompt, measured rationale in-code); entity-form licensed rejections (functional-uniqueness ground dropped — it would name the gold entity; gold-leak guard guards the gold NAME); f2bt HFLM forced-choice scorer + seeded retry sampler + CellGuard REUSED BYTE-IDENTICAL; poc/f2b, poc/f2b-transfer, poc/deconf-b trees NOT modified). MANDATORY PRE-LAUNCH (extended in rules-1-c): --mock green AND a real-model pilot (--pilot-n 24, seed 0, PILOT-labelled, structurally incapable of emitting final rows) covering EVERY GPU arm in the launch set (A1/A3/A5/A7/c1) with the host-validity floors cleared BEFORE any final-phase GPU spend — the rules-1-b pilot covered A1/A7 only and its A5 floor failure was found post-freeze. Modal hygiene: nohup+setsid; 'modal app stop ap-<id>' after killing any client (E5 lesson, bd memory).
runner_constraints.kernel_arm: engine rules compiled from endorsed axioms-v0 + axioms-kinship-v1 EXPLICATOR-ENDORSED 2026-07-11 with ONE revision (PROPOSED-ASM-1190): grandparent groundingNote 'the parent' -> 'a parent' (false-uniqueness fix, no functionality axiom licenses the definite article), re-minted urn:kot:bciqlzfmtaa5... -> urn:kot:bciqobx6ivvu... with the dependent chain-* axiom records regenerated; corpus re-pinned in this record (be3f2d40...). Covering premise pointer (PROPOSED-ASM-1121) now resolves to the minted cover-parent.json record whose endorsement block cites the endorsed explication concepts/parent.json (sha 60508432..., covering clause read RELATION-LEVEL: to be someone's parent is to be that someone's mother or father — the exact form R-COVER-ELIM uses), superseding the bare design-doc-gap pointer. Maintainer endorsement rides the freeze approval; freeze BLOCKS if concept records change URNs again.
runner_constraints.roles: frozen-design discipline: this DRAFT was authored by the build role; FREEZE is the coordinator's (prereg-freeze.py after committing the pinned files and re-verifying shas); the run is the experiment-runner role's; grading is verdict-gen + analyst; audit is the cross-vendor auditor. The certificate + conformance were RE-RUN 2026-07-11 by the runner role on the ENDORSED+REVISED corpus (registered $0 CPU re-run, pre-freeze precondition pin — NOT a results-log append): certificate-result sha e0071e9e... pinned in artifact_hashes carries success_asm_1131=true, gates_asm_1163_all_pass=true, kill_a_fired=false; conformance byte-identical 1207/1207 (sha 0ed1769a...). RULES-1-C lineage: the rules-1 GPU campaign 20260712-070956-modal is VOIDED (maintainer decision 2026-07-12, pre-append: results-log/rules-1.jsonl was never created, no unblind occurred); its bytes are retained under poc/rules-1/results-incoming/ for audit and may never be appended or reused as rows in ANY record.

title: RULES-1-C (supersedes rules-1-b, frozen 2b81375e...: its mandatory host-validity pilot FAILED the frozen A5 floor — acc(A5)=0/24 (and acc(A1)=0/24) on the FIXED relation-word frame, launch refused fail-closed 2026-07-12, $0 final-phase spend. ROOT CAUSE (form mis-attribution, diagnosed 2026-07-12 with $0.25 of A10G probes): the A5 floor premise 0.7912 is the nsk1 ENTITY-form bprime datum (n=958), but rules-1/rules-1-b asked the RELATION-WORD form — the form the nsk1-g2d assessment records as 'dead-at-floor at every tested host' (1.7B 0.00-0.10); 8 frame variants measured on the pinned R3 (as-built / no-pad / pad-above / chat-template / the exact nsk1 generation channel / story content) never put the gold relation word top-1, while the ENTITY form on the SAME stated-facts world with the SAME f2bt forced-choice scorer scored 11/12) — same WMRE-1 MVE question, arms, endpoints and budget as rules-1-b, with (1) the host surface switched to the ENTITY form (nsk1 g2b form 2): question 'Who is the <gold_rel> of <base>?', per-item 2-option forced choice over the non-base lexicon surfaces (bridge + chain-top; anti-echo structural; CHANCE 0.5 DISCLOSED), answer = chain-top NAME (third-party CLUTRR proof_state gold, predates the kernel; direction-explicit infill cue 'the {rel} of {a_name} is'; no option enumeration anywhere in the prompt), (2) A7 rebuilt RENDER-ONLY (bare derived fact, no stated-facts block, no proof prose in the prompt — measured on the pinned R1: facts+proof 4/12, facts+bare 3/12 [bridge-frequency capture, the g2d pathology], render-only+proof 7/12, render-only+bare 12/12; the proof stays in the engine payload and run-record ledger), (3) the host-validity floors re-derived for the 0.5 chance floor: acc(A7) >= 0.85 AND acc(A5) >= 0.75 (pinned analysis/rules_1c.py), and (4) ALL arms pilot-gated: the mandatory pre-launch real-model pilot must cover EVERY GPU arm in the launch set (A1/A3/A5/A7/c1) and show the host-validity floors cleared BEFORE any final-phase GPU spend. PILOT EVIDENCE (2026-07-12, A10G fp32, n=24, seed 0, PILOT-labelled): acc(A5)=24/24=1.000, acc(A7)=24/24=1.000, acc(A1)=13/24=0.542 (chance-consistent inert floor; headroom gate <=0.85 clear); rows sha db40193088cb..., dir poc/rules-1/results-incoming/pilot-20260712-rules1c-v2.
